title: What exactly was Gendo trying to achieve
display_title: What exactly was Gendo trying to achieve
wikitext:
[]: What exactly was Gendo trying to achieve?             Quote Post by GAP » Tue Dec 30, 2008 4:16 am I dam sure that this question is asked many times before but I want to know what Gendo was attempting to do even before trying to revive Yui? I already know that he only married Yui just to get into SEELE but how did Gendo know of SEELE in the first place and also what was his plans before he decided to revive his wife Yui?

[]:             Quote Post by Nasmoe » Tue Dec 30, 2008 4:51 am I didn't think he was trying to do anything before
